beforeHooks.title: "before all" hook in "Step 0: Component file checks"
beforeHooks.fullTitle: Step 0: Component file checks "before all" hook in "Step 0: Component file checks"

tests.title: File exists
tests.fullTitle: Step 0: Component file checks File exists
tests.context: "File must exist at the path specified in ctkconfig.json"

tests.title: File contains valid YAML
tests.fullTitle: Step 0: Component file checks File contains valid YAML
tests.context:
[
  "File must contain valid YAML",
  "Component manifest must be valid YAML"
]

beforeHooks.title: "before all" hook in "Step 1: Component manifest checks"
beforeHooks.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks "before all" hook in "Step 1: Component manifest checks"

tests.title: Document of kind  'Component' is found
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Document of kind  'Component' is found
tests.context: "Component manifest must contain a document of kind: Component"

tests.title: Component api version is within supported versions
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Component api version is within supported versions
tests.context: "Component manifest must contain a supported apiVersion"

tests.title: Component has metadata field
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Component has metadata field
tests.context: "Component manifest must contain a metadata field"

tests.title: Component metadata has name and labels
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Component metadata has name and labels
tests.context: "Component metadata must contain name and labels fields"

tests.title: Component has spec field
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Component has spec field
tests.context: "Component manifest must contain a spec field"

tests.title: Spec has coreFunction with exposed and dependent APIs
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Spec has coreFunction with exposed and dependent APIs
tests.context: "Component spec must contain a coreFunction field with exposedAPIs and dependentAPIs"

tests.title: Spec has security function
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Spec has security function
tests.context: "Component spec must contain a security field"

tests.title: Security function has canvas system role or exposed apis
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Security function has canvas system role or exposed apis
tests.context: "Security function must contain a canvas system role (string) or expose a partyRole API"

tests.title: All resources are labelled with the component name
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks All resources are labelled with the component name
tests.context: "All resources in the component manifest must be labelled with the component name"

tests.title: Standard component specification exists in ctk
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Standard component specification exists in ctk
tests.context: "Standard component specification must exist in the resources folder"

tests.title: Component ID from the manifest of component under test matches the standard specification
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Component ID from the manifest of component under test matches the standard specification
tests.context: "Component manifest ID must match the ID in the standard component specification"

tests.title: Exposed Apis defined in standard component specification must be specified in component manifest
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Exposed Apis defined in standard component specification must be specified in component manifest
tests.context: "All mandatory Exposed APIs defined in the standard component specification must be specified in the component manifest"

tests.title: Exposed API versions in component manifest must match one of the allowed versions in the standard spec
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Exposed API versions in component manifest must match one of the allowed versions in the standard spec
tests.context: "For each exposed API, the deployed version must exist in the standard component specification"

tests.title: Dependent APIs defined in the standard component specification must be specified in the component manifest
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Dependent APIs defined in the standard component specification must be specified in the component manifest
tests.context: "All mandatory Dependent APIs in the standard component specification must also be declared in the component manifest"

tests.title: Dependent API versions in the component manifest must match one of the allowed versions in the standard spec
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks Dependent API versions in the component manifest must match one of the allowed versions in the standard spec
tests.context: "For each dependent API, the deployed version must exist in the standard component specification"

tests.title: All swagger urls must be valid and accessible and version fields
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Component manifest checks All swagger urls must be valid and accessible and version fields
tests.context: "All swagger urls must be valid and accessible"

tests.title: Kubectl configured correctly
tests.fullTitle: Step 0: Basic environment connectivity tests Kubectl configured correctly
tests.context:
[
  "The purpose of this test is to check if the kubectl is configured correctly",
  "The configuration must be available and the context must be set to the correct cluster"
]

beforeHooks.title: "before all" hook in "Step 1: Deployment component tests"
beforeHooks.fullTitle: Step 1: Deployment component tests "before all" hook in "Step 1: Deployment component tests"

tests.title: Component can be found in namespace: components
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Deployment component tests Component can be found in namespace: components
tests.context: "The component must be found in the established namespace for components"

tests.title: Component has deployed successfully (status: Complete)
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Deployment component tests Component has deployed successfully (status: Complete)
tests.context: "The component must have deployed successfully and its status must be complete"

tests.title: Security api must return at least one partyrole with canvas system role defined in component file
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Deployment component tests Security api must return at least one partyrole with canvas system role defined in component file
tests.context: "The security api must return at least one partyrole, unless only canvasSystemRole is defined"

tests.title: CTKs for exposed apis have been executed successfully
tests.fullTitle: Step 1: Deployment component tests CTKs for exposed apis have been executed successfully
tests.context: "This step configures the api ctks. There must be no errors during the process"
